response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience as a senior software engineer and strong general software architecture skills, his resume lacks specific experience in the core areas of this role. The position requires a deep background in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis for deep-learning workloads on AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design, which are not clearly demonstrated in his profile.
strengths: Extensive experience (15+ years) in senior software engineering roles.
Strong background in system architecture, full-stack development, and distributed systems.
Demonstrated ability to work with performance-sensitive systems and optimize processes.
concerns: Lack of explicit experience in SoC and IP modeling, a key responsibility.
Limited demonstrated experience with AI accelerators or deep-learning workload optimization.
Absence of GPU, SIMD, or MIMD architecture experience, which are preferred qualifications.
